CREATE TABLE test_strings (input String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
SELECT input, normalizeUTF8NFKC(input) AS nfkc, length(normalizeUTF8NFKC(input)) AS nfkc_len FROM test_strings;
SELECT input, normalizeUTF8NFKC(normalizeUTF8NFKC(input)) AS nested_nfkc FROM test_strings;
SELECT input, length(input) AS original_len, normalizeUTF8NFKC(input) AS nfkc, length(normalizeUTF8NFKC(input)) AS nfkc_len FROM test_strings WHERE length(normalizeUTF8NFKC(input)) > 0;
CREATE TABLE additional_strings (words String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
SELECT a.input, b.words, normalizeUTF8NFKC(a.input) AS nfkc_a, normalizeUTF8NFKC(b.words) AS nfkc_b FROM test_strings a JOIN additional_strings b ON length(a.input) = length(b.words);
WITH (SELECT normalizeUTF8NFKC('1/2') AS fraction, length(normalizeUTF8NFKC('1/2')) AS fraction_len) AS subquery SELECT fraction, fraction_len;
SELECT input, normalizeUTF8NFKC(input) AS nfkc FROM test_strings WHERE input LIKE 'á%';
